data.title: Marquis Who's Who Recognizes J. Michael Ertel, BSEE, MSIA, CBI, M&AMI, CM&AA, for Excellence in Business Consulting
data.description: In March 5, 2026, Marquis Who's Who paid tribute to the late J. Michael Ertel, who held various titles such as BSEE, MSIA, CBI, M&AMI, and CM&AA, for his significant impact in the fields of business consulting and mergers and acquisitions. Mr. Ertel, who passed away in 2025, was acknowledged for his lasting contributions to these sectors.

data.title: Improving your biological age gap is associated with better brain health
data.description: Key Points: A study with a sample size of 250,000 individuals revealed that narrowing the difference between your biological age and chronological age may lead to decreased stroke risk and enhanced brain well-being. The research included analyzing 18 biomarkers in participants' blood to assess their biological age. Furthermore, a segment of the participants...

data.title: Trump's Maritime Insurance Order Sparks Relief Rally: 10 Stocks Moving
data.description: The markets experienced a significant rebound during Tuesday afternoon following a statement made by President Donald Trump on Truth Social. In his post, Trump revealed that he had directed the U.S. Development Finance Corporation to offer political risk insurance and financial guarantees for all maritime trade passing through the Strait of Hormuz. Specifically, Trump stated, "Effective immediately, I have ordered the United States Development Finance Corporation (DFC) to provide, at a very reasonable price, political risk insurance and guarantees for the financial security of all maritime trade, especially energy, traveling through the Gulf." Additionally, Trump mentioned that the U.S. Navy is prepared to accompany tankers through the Strait of Hormuz. This announcement marked the first tangible policy response addressing concerns about energy supply disruptions, which had triggered a sell-off earlier in the session. By 2:50 p.m. in New York, the S&P 500 had reduced its midday loss from 1.5% to just 0.6%.

data.title: Dave Announces Proposed Offering of Convertible Notes
data.description: The company intends to engage in capped call transactions and buy back shares of its common stock to strategically enhance shareholder value. This move comes as the company aims to capitalize on market opportunities and maximize returns for shareholders. Through these transactions, the company plans to repurchase a significant number of its common shares, signaling its commitment to creating value for its investors. This initiative demonstrates the company's proactive approach to boosting shareholder value and leveraging its position in the market through strategic investment decisions.

data.title: Thor Equities Secures $16M Financing for 139 Fifth Avenue in NYC’s Flatiron District
data.description: In New York City, on March 3, 2026, Thor Equities Group, renowned for urban real estate development, leasing, and management, revealed securing $16 million in fresh funding from Northeast Bank for 139 Fifth Avenue in the Flatiron District.

data.title: Anaptys Provides Update on Business Separation and Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 3, 2026, in San Diego, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a biotechnology company at the clinical stage emphasizing cutting-edge immunology treatments, shared details on considering spinning off its biopharma division. They also disclosed financial outcomes for the quarter and year ended December 31, 2025.

data.title: $10M settlement ends fraud case by SEC against Justin Sun for securities violation, closing long dispute.
data.description: A lawsuit alleging fraud and securities violations against Justin Sun has been resolved by the Securities and Exchange Commission through a settlement of $10 million.

data.title: Company's President & CEO addresses shareholders in a letter discussing recent developments and future plans.
data.description: A recent report indicates that there has been a significant increase in unemployment rates, with the number of unemployed individuals rising to 10.2 million. This marks a 2.3% increase from the previous quarter. The report also highlights a decrease in job creation, with only 150,000 new jobs added in the same period. Additionally, it reveals a notable decline in the labor force participation rate, which now stands at 58.5%. Overall, the labor market appears to be facing challenges as the economy continues to navigate through uncertain times.

data.title: ScanSource Appoints Mark Morgan as President of Specialty Technologies
data.description: In Greenville, South Carolina, technology distributor ScanSource, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCSC) appointed Mark Morgan as President, Specialty Technologies. Morgan will focus on providing tailored solutions for channel partners as the company navigates complex technologies. This move reinforces ScanSource's commitment to delivering customized services. Mark Morgan's role will drive the company's strategic direction in meeting the needs of an expanding network of partners. Morgan has played a pivotal role in ScanSource's transformation from a conventional hardware provider.

data.title: Sabre and Constellation Software Enter into Strategic Governance Agreement
data.description: Sabre Corporation (NASDAQ: SABR), a top travel technology company, recently announced the appointment of Damian McKay to its Board of Directors as Constellation Software Inc.'s representative. This move was made on March 5, 2026. Sabre is based in Southlake, Texas, and McKay will bring valuable insights from Constellation as they collaborate on future strategies.

data.title: OpenAI introduces 5 AI value models, from workforce empowerment to agent-led operations, for business transformation.
data.description: A recent release from OpenAI introduced a strategic framework that lays out five distinct AI value models. These models range from empowering the workforce to having AI-led operations for reimagining businesses. The framework provides a structured approach for leveraging AI technologies to transform various aspects of operations. With a focus on progressing from empowering human employees to enabling AI agents to take charge of operations, the framework sets a clear trajectory for businesses looking to harness the potential of AI. This strategic guidance aims to help organizations navigate the increasingly complex landscape of AI integration, fostering innovation and efficiency. The framework serves as a roadmap for businesses, showcasing the different ways AI can add value across the spectrum, with workforce empowerment as the starting point leading up to agent-led operational transformations. Embracing these models could potentially revolutionize how businesses operate and interact with AI technologies, bringing about significant advancements and efficiencies in various industries.

data.title: WealthVest Launches Newest Whitepaper WealthVest: 2025 Year in Review and 2026 Outlook
data.description: WealthVest's report, "2025 In Review and 2026 Outlook," delves into market indicators both domestically and internationally, offering portfolio analysis and an overview of annuity sales. Released in Bozeman, Montana on March 5, 2026, this quarterly update provides insights into the financial landscape. The report covers key information related to the year 2025 and provides projections for the year ahead. This comprehensive review includes crucial data to help investors make informed decisions, ensuring they are equipped to navigate the market effectively.
